name: hospitality accounting teams processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For hospitality accounting teams processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate invoice matching causes supplier penalties. We automate vendor invoice matching instead of manual invoice matching and reporting.
problem_solved: Inaccurate invoice matching leading to discrepancies
